articles.title: WWE makes questionable claim for WrestleMania Intercontinental title ladder match - Cageside Seats

articles.title: American Idol Shocker: Top 12 Results Held After 'Unprecedented' Voting Response Raises 'Accuracy' Concerns - TVLine
articles.description: American Idol Season 24 finally went live on March 30, but due to an "unprecedented" number of votes received, the results are being reevaluated for "accuracy."

articles.title: Mary Beth Hurt, versatile actress nominated for three Tonys, dies at 79 - The Washington Post
articles.description: She appeared in several movies, including “The World According to Garp” and Woody Allen’s “Interiors,” but made her biggest mark on the Broadway stage.

articles.title: Thieves steal paintings by Renoir, Cézanne and Matisse from a private museum in Italy - AP News
articles.description: Thieves have stolen three valuable paintings from a private museum in northern Italy. The works by Renoir, Cézanne and Matisse are worth millions. Police said Monday that the thieves forced open a door during the night of March 22-23. Local media reported the…

articles.title: One of the world’s most famous design offices launches ultra-luxe prefab homes — for a fraction of the price of a standard house - New York Post
articles.description: The Eames Office has announced the made-to-order Eames Pavilion System, a prefab kit that lets any buyer assemble their own Eames-style homes.
